title: PJUtils
description: Mod that lets you copy stuff.
body:
There is no GitHub repo yet but you can contact me in other way. [Here is my website](https://panjohnny.vercel.app/).
## Dependencies
Required:
 - Fabric API

Recommended:
 - Cloth Config API
 - Mod Menu

## Feautures
- Copy Stuff
  * coords
  * chunk coords
  * world boundaries
  * world time
  * EXP
  * score
  * yours UUID
  * frame rate
  * IP of server you are on

- Configurable in-game
- Client side only
- Adds PJUtils button and close game button to pause screen

### Coming soon
 - client side command to open the menu
 - better config handling
 - more config options
 - more stuff to copy?

## Incompatible mods
There are none known incompatible mods. Issue tracker coming soon. For now you can contact in other way.
